menu.description: Rollout menu: Print categorized Nx targets for apps/cdk-emc-notary (drill down via menu:* targets)

menu:json.description: Rollout menu: Output categorized targets as JSON (machine-readable)

options.command: pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category cdk-stack
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category build-test
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category stack-info
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category ssh
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category bootstrap
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category provisioning
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category ssl
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category credentials
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category users-mailboxes
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category dns
pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/rollout-menu.cli.ts --category miab
